# Virtual Routing and Forwarding (VRF)

## Get vrf associated items

Use '--view refs' to get associated items of selected vrfs
- EPGs
- bridge domains and IP subnets
- L3 Outs

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_vrf.all_refs:iserver.output.default
```

Developer

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_vrf.all_refs:devel.debug
```
